scripts.local:logs: bash -lc 'docker compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.local.yml logs --tail=${TAIL_LINES:-200} openclaw-gateway'
scripts.local:cron:list: bash -lc 'docker compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.local.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway openclaw cron list --all'
scripts.local:test:gmail:read: bash -lc 'docker compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.local.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway gog gmail search "newer_than:1d" --account pip@meador.me --plain'
scripts.cloud:restart: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && test -n "$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app OPENCLAW_DEPLOY_ROOT=/opt/openclaw bash ./scripts/restart-cloud.sh \"$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME\"'\''"'
scripts.cloud:rebuild: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && test -n "$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME" && bash ./scripts/sync-cloud-app.sh "$VM_NAME" "$PROJECT_ID" "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app OPENCLAW_DEPLOY_ROOT=/opt/openclaw bash ./scripts/rebuild-cloud.sh \"$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME\"'\''"'
scripts.cloud:ps: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml ps'\''"'
scripts.cloud:logs: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml logs --tail=${TAIL_LINES:-200} openclaw-gateway'\''"'
scripts.cloud:cron:apply: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app bash ./scripts/apply-cloud-cron.sh ${CLOUD_CRON_FILE:-config/cron.cloud.json}'\''"'
scripts.cloud:cron:list: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway openclaw cron list --all'\''"'
scripts.cloud:cron:run:digest: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app bash ./scripts/run-cloud-cron.sh pip-newsletter-digest-morning'\''"'
scripts.cloud:test:gmail:read: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway gog gmail search \"newer_than:1d\" --account pip@meador.me --plain'\''"'
scripts.cloud:test:gmail:send: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway bash -lc '\''\''\''printf \"Cloud Gmail send test\\n\" | gog gmail send --account pip@meador.me --to ${GMAIL_TEST_TO:-sean@meador.me} --subject \"${GMAIL_TEST_SUBJECT:-Pip Cloud Gmail send test}\" --body-file=-'\''\''\'''\''"'
